title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (SIX), PARAGRAPH "aj" FOR THE MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, TITLE B, SECTION ONE, PAGE TWO HUNDRED SIXTY-EIGHT, OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWELVE HUNDRED.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5120 / 52 OG No. 7, 3532 (July, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1465, June 14, 1956 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (SIX), PARAGRAPH "aj" FOR THE MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, TITLE B, SECTION ONE, PAGE TWO HUNDRED SIXTY-EIGHT, OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWELVE HUNDRED.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (six), paragraph "aj" for the Mountain Province, Title B, Section One, page two hundred sixty-eight, of Republic Act Numbered Twelve hundred is amended to read as follows:

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.
